name: miadi-codex-orchestration-kit
description: Miadi-native Codex orchestration workflows for session chartering, RISE wave plans, source ledgers, rispec readiness review, and handoff closeout.

interface.shortDescription: Charter, plan, ledger, review, and close Miadi Codex sessions.
interface.longDescription: A Codex-native orchestration kit for Miadi work. It helps turn raw session intent into a charter, RISE-aligned wave plan, evidence ledger, rispec promotion decision, and replayable handoff without promoting provisional rispecs prematurely.
defaultPrompt: Start a Miadi orchestration session for this task.
Create a RISE wave plan for this mission.
Review this rispec for plugin readiness.
